title: NextBestAction
description: Schema for the next-best-action command output. Provides a prioritised, structured list of recommended actions for the RM to take with a specific client, spanning relationship management, portfolio, compliance, and administrative categories.

client_id.description: Unique CRM identifier for the client.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this next-best-action output was generated.

generated_by.description: RM user identifier or email who triggered this next-best-action request.

actions.description: Ordered list of recommended actions, sorted by priority (high to low) then by classification.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for this action within the response (e.g. NBA-001, NBA-002). Stable across re-runs for the same underlying trigger.

title.description: Short, action-oriented title for the RM (e.g. 'Schedule annual suitability review', 'Discuss Asia tech allocation').

classification.description: Category of action to help the RM prioritise by workflow type.

what.description: Specific, concrete action the RM should take. Written as a clear instruction (e.g. 'Call the client to discuss reducing Financials sector exposure from 28% to below the 25% mandate limit').

why.description: Rationale explaining why this action is recommended now. Should reference relevant triggers (e.g. market event, approaching deadline, client conversation).

supporting_evidence.description: Data points or evidence supporting this recommendation. Can be a single string or an array of discrete evidence items.

suitability_note.description: RM-safe suitability framing for this action — how to position it appropriately in a client conversation without making prohibited claims.

priority.description: Priority level for this action relative to others in this output.

suggested_timing.description: Suggested timeframe or deadline for completing this action (e.g. 'This week', 'Before end of quarter', 'Within 30 days', 'Before next meeting').

requires_approval.description: True if this action requires internal approval (compliance pre-clearance, credit approval, product approval, etc.) before execution.

approval_type.description: Type of approval required (only present if requires_approval is true, e.g. 'Compliance pre-clearance', 'Credit committee', 'Product approval').

status.description: Current execution status of this action.

summary_note.description: High-level narrative summary of the most important actions and the overall theme of this next-best-action output. Written for the RM as a quick orientation before reading the detailed action list.

data_as_of.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating the most recent data point used to generate these recommendations. May differ from generated_at if data was cached.
